Ridgeline · EFT → FD-258

Upload an EFT (NIST ITL) file. Demographics and fingerprint impressions are extracted and laid onto a print-ready 8"×8" FD-258 card — entirely in your browser.

Drag & drop your .eft file here

or click to browse

Print preview

Rendering…

The card outline is a preview for alignment only. Print & Download output only your data & prints (no card lines) to overlay onto a real pre-printed FD-258 card.

Printer calibration

Nudge all content to match how your printer pulls paper.
